pi_items.verified_value: Official Chinook database from https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database (59 customer records)
pi_items.source: Downloaded and verified from official GitHub repository

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the official Chinook database (59 customer records) from GitHub, which is real data. The acquisitions source database is synthetic, containing 18 lead records created in setup_task.sh, of which 15 are new (3 are duplicates of existing Chinook customers). The target database paths and expected record count of 15 are all verified. Support representative ID 3 corresponds to Jane Peacock, confirmed in the official Chinook database schema. Country transformation rules (US→USA, CA→Canada, MX→Mexico) map ISO codes to full names as required by the Chinook database structure.
